focus: Synthesis pass over iterations 1-8: dedupe adoption backlog, answer Q1-Q4, and confirm no-new-mode verdict.

graphEvents.label: sk-design foundations and content refinement tail

label: Final adoption backlog dedupes to five existing sk-design homes, not a new mode
source: iterations 1-8 delta stream and iteration-009 target verification
target: sk-design interface, audit, motion, foundations/shared, and content/mechanical references
recommendation: Implement as five scoped patches in a future packet; do not create a sixth mode or parallel detector/register system.

label: Interface P1 cluster: native-image/mock gate and compact brief confirmation belong in the real-UI loop
source: impeccable shape.md and codex.md candidates from iteration 6
evidence: Current real_ui_loop has an optional pre-build direction gate but no palette-first native-image probe, approved mock direction, ingredient inventory, or compact brief confirmation pause.
recommendation: Add a guarded branch for open-ended high-fi or image-led work; skip it for small pinned changes.

label: Audit P1 cluster: DESIGN.md drift should become an audit finding when a project has a Style Reference or token sidecar
evidence: Current audit catches token misuse and one-off values but does not explicitly use DESIGN.md as a live UI source-of-truth check.
recommendation: Add advisory drift detection for fonts, colors, and radii outside DESIGN.md or token sidecar unless a deliberate update path is documented.

label: Product-flow P1 cluster: onboarding needs first-value, skip/dismiss, sample-data, and no-repeat checks
evidence: Current Compact Product Flow Floor mentions first-run and empty states, but not aha moment, time-to-value, optional onboarding, contextual teaching, sample data, or repeated-tooltip failure.
recommendation: Extend the product-flow floor with one compact onboarding clause.

label: Motion P2 cluster: high-ambition interaction requests need a guardrail before implementation
evidence: Current advanced craft covers popovers, tooltips, entry patterns, debugging, and shorthand caveats but lacks an ambition matrix and sk-code handoff for heavy browser mechanisms.
recommendation: Add a short escalation rule: propose 2-3 context-specific directions, choose one signature moment, verify progressive enhancement/reduced motion/devices, and hand implementation-heavy mechanisms to sk-code.

label: Audit hardening P2 cluster: overlay clipping should merge prior overlay/top-layer candidates into one probe
source: impeccable interaction-design.md and detector rule 36 from iterations 5 and 7
evidence: Current hardening covers text overflow, translation overflow, and generic production states, while motion covers popover origin; neither explicitly probes overlay containment inside clipping or scroll containers.
recommendation: Add one probe row for tooltips, menus, dropdowns, popovers, and modals inside overflow containers and near viewport edges.

label: Foundations/content tail should be grouped to avoid scattered micro-edits
evidence: Current targets cover broad anti-default rules but miss selected precise tells: default-font convergence, near-duplicate pairings, semantic layer order examples, rounded icon-tile feature cards, copy cadence, paragraph specificity, and localization terminology.
recommendation: Implement as one lower-priority foundations/content/mechanical refinement packet after P1/P2 items.

label: No command-flow reference remains unread from the carried-forward list
evidence: Iteration 8 closed the tail list and strategy Next Focus now says no command-flow reference remains unread.

label: Most impeccable command flows remain already covered by current sk-design mode boundaries
evidence: Audit scoring/evidence, register-first posture, adapt/responsive context, motion/delight budgets, mechanical layout gates, copy gate, and md-generator measured Style Reference boundaries already exist.

label: Several earlier findings are duplicate expressions of the same future edit
evidence: Overlay reliability spans iterations 1,5,7; copy refinements span iterations 3,6,7; typography defaults span iterations 1,4,7; product-flow refinements span iterations 5,8.

direction: Create a new sk-design mode for impeccable shape, onboarding, live, overdrive, detector, or document flows
reason: No cluster clears distinct intent, output, and owner; all useful candidates map to existing sk-design homes.

direction: Adopt impeccable detector engine, registry, hooks, CLI scans, or support matrix
reason: These are infrastructure. sk-design should adopt selected semantic checks into audit/interface/foundations, not a parallel detector system.

direction: Replace md-generator with impeccable document seed or sidecar mode
reason: sk-design md-generator is intentionally measured and extraction-backed. Impeccable document/init seed flows are either already-covered by register/context intake or out-of-scope infrastructure.

direction: Adopt STYLE prose validator or punctuation house style wholesale
reason: The reusable value is selected UI-copy smell examples. Build enforcement, punctuation policing, and generic editorial house style are outside sk-design scope.
